title: Msqito

'''Msqitos''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of large flying [[Insect/Legends|insects]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kubindi/Legends|Kubindi]]. While the species laid their [[Egg/Legends|eggs]] near [[Water/Legends|water]], as adults they lived in [[Tree/Legends|forests]], such as the [[Silver Forest of Dreams]].

==Biology and appearance==
Msqitos were flying [[Insect/Legends|insects]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kubindi/Legends|Kubindi]], a world plagued by frequent [[Solar flare/Legends|solar flares]]. The insects had a relatively large wingspan and had bodies of an equal length to the height of an adult [[Human/Legends|Human]],<ref name="M6" /> a species who, on average, stood at 1.8 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall.<ref name="RPGRCR">''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Revised Core Rulebook]]''</ref>

==Behavior==
Msqitos would lay their [[Egg/Legends|eggs]] near bodies of [[Water/Legends|water]], and then each [[Standard day/Legends|day]], all those that hatched would make their way to another habitat together as a flock. Adult members of the species inhabited [[Tree/Legends|forested]] areas.<ref name="M6" />

==History==
When the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]], along with several other bounty hunters, traveled to Kubindi in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], he encountered a flock of msqitos in the [[Silver Forest of Dreams]] and nearly crashed his [[JumpMaster 5000/Legends|JumpMaster 5000]], [[Punishing One/Legends|''Punishing One'']], after swerving to avoid hitting them. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], who followed the hunters to the planet, witnessed a flock of newly hatched msqitos making their way to the Silver Forest of Dreams from a nearby [[lake]], one of which an [[aquabeast]] attempted to eat.<ref name="M6" />

==Behind the scenes==
Msqitos first appeared in ''[[Star Wars Missions 6: The Search for Grubba the Hutt]]'', a [[1998]] novel written by [[Dave Wolverton]] as part of the ''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' series.<ref name="M6" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 6: The Search for Grubba the Hutt]]'' {{1st}}
